artworks.title: Inferno Duel
artworks.material: Hand-painted resin, scenic base, flame-effect finish
artworks.description: A dramatic two-character battle scene staged across a cracked lava base, combining dynamic motion, armor detail, and theatrical contrast.
artworks.alt: Hand-painted fantasy battle diorama with lava base

artworks.title: Orc Warband
artworks.material: Hand-painted resin miniatures and textured scenic base
artworks.description: A compact group composition featuring multiple warrior figures, layered weapons, banners, and terrain details for a tabletop display effect.
artworks.alt: Hand-painted fantasy orc warband miniature group

artworks.title: Crimson Sorceress
artworks.material: Hand-painted resin with high-contrast armor and base accents
artworks.description: A striking single-character figure built around sharp silhouettes, saturated red armor, and a supernatural display base.

artworks.title: Arcane Standard Bearer
artworks.material: Hand-painted resin, ornate base, metallic and neon accents
artworks.description: A ceremonial fantasy figure with a vertical composition, elaborate armor, and luminous green base details.
artworks.alt: Fantasy standard bearer sculpture with glowing green base

artworks.title: Ember Warlord
artworks.material: Hand-painted resin with leather, metal, and battle-worn textures
artworks.description: A heavy armored warrior figure with warm skin tones, dark metalwork, and a compact collector-display silhouette.

artworks.title: Azure Paladin
artworks.material: Hand-painted resin with blue cloak, ice-effect base, and metallic armor
artworks.description: A heroic sword-bearing figure defined by a sweeping blue cloak, icy basework, and polished armor highlights.
artworks.alt: Blue cloaked fantasy paladin sculpture with ice base
